title: Segfault in sqlite3VdbeExec
description:
yongheng added on 2020-06-06 17:03:48:
Seems the root cause is not fixed.

POC:
---
CREATE TABLE a(b, c);
SELECT sum(c) OVER(), sum(coalesce(max(c), b)) OVER(ORDER BY c) FROM a;
---
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(id INTEGER, value INTEGER, text_value VARCHAR(255), PRIMARY KEY(id));
INSERT INTO test_table(value, text_value) VALUES (NULL, 'test1'), (5, 'test2'), (10, NULL), (15, 'test3');
CREATE TABLE another_table(ref_id INTEGER, amount FLOAT, FOREIGN KEY(ref_id) REFERENCES test_table(id));
INSERT INTO another_table(ref_id, amount) VALUES (1, 10.5), (2, NULL), (3, 20.0), (4, 30.0);
SELECT SUM(value) OVER() AS total_value, SUM(COALESCE(MAX(amount), value)) OVER(ORDER BY text_value) AS adjusted_sum FROM test_table JOIN another_table ON test_table.id = another_table.ref_id;
key_bug_features: SELECT sum with coalesce and window functions
